description: Dynamic call resolution fixture: computed-literal and reflection patterns. Flagged kinds (eval, computed-key) emit sink edges and are excluded from expected-edges.

edges.notes: greet.call(ctx, 'world') — reflection kind, resolves to greet()
greet.apply(ctx, ['world']) — reflection kind, resolves to greet()
invoker.call(handler, 10) — reflection kind, resolves to invoker()
obj["greet"]("world") — computed-literal kind, resolves to greet()
